north_star: Positive reply rate on signal-led outbound

sets.label: Quality Gates
sets.objective: Nothing reaches a prospect or CMS without passing an automated gate
key_results: 100% of lead lists grade B+ before Smartlead upload
Clay col 60 validator PASS rate >= 95% on exports
Content gate blocks 100% of near-duplicates (similarity >= 0.55) before publish
sets.rationale: Volume without gates burns domains and SEO. Gates make scale safe.

sets.label: Deploy Velocity
sets.objective: Ship a new campaign in 3 days from ICP sign-off, not 2 weeks
key_results: New campaign live in <= 3 business days from direction approval
144-variant copy assembled in Clay with zero manual paste
n8n push failure rate < 2% across Smartlead and HeyReach
sets.rationale: Speed wins experiments. Automation removes the coordination tax.

sets.label: Compounding Loop
sets.objective: Turn replies, calls, and content into the next signal cycle
key_results: 80% of Hot-tier engagers contacted within 24 hours
4 founder posts per month sourced from call mining
Positive reply rate >= 2% on signal-led Omnibound campaigns
sets.rationale: Outbound and content are one system. The loop is the moat.
